basics.headline: Software Engineer
basics.school: ▪ Bachelor of Science in Information Technology (Reading) (SLIIT -2026)

about:
As a third year Software Engineering student at the Sri Lanka Institute of Information Technology (SLIIT), I am
seeking an internship in full-stack. I aim to apply my theoretical knowledge, gain practical skills, and
contribute to a professional environment. My interests include developing AI applications, designing machine
learning systems to create innovative and efficient solutions

educationItems.school: Bachelor of Science in Information Technology
educationItems.degree: Sri Lanka Institute of Information Technology (SLIIT) Diploma in Information Technology Sri Lanka Institute of Information Technology (SLIIT)

projects: Valampuri – Hotel Management System
Full-stack MERN Application
Expected 2026
– Designed and developed a hotel management platform supporting room booking, customer profiles, and
media storage
– Built RESTful APIs using Node.js and Express.js with MongoDB for scalable data handling
– Implemented secure authentication using JWT and bcrypt for password hashing
– Integrated Firebase Storage for real-time image upload and retrieval
Halo – E-Commerce Platform
Scalable Online Shopping System
– Developed a full-featured e-commerce platform using the MERN stack
– Implemented secure user authentication and authorization using JWT
– Integrated Stripe for secure online payment processing
– Built responsive UI using Material UI and Ant Design
– Added internationalization support using i18next and implemented CI/CD pipelines
VEHIBOOK – Vehicle Booking System
Java Web Application
– Developed a vehicle rental booking system with booking, editing, and cancellation features
– Implemented backend using Java Servlets and MySQL
– Designed responsive UI using JSP, HTML, CSS, and JavaScript
LOTRACK – Employee Location Tracker
Real-Time Tracking Platform
– Built a real-time employee location tracking system using Geolocation API
– Integrated Google OAuth for secure authentication
– Implemented backend services using Node.js, Express.js, and MongoDB
